Form.Name: ue_HIL_ProductSearch
Form.Caption: Excavator Product Search
Form.FilterFormSpec: itmUf_HIL_ItemDimentionsMixMatch = FV(ItemDimentionsMixMatch) AND ProductCode LIKE 'FG-%' AND ShowInDropDownList = 1 AND Stat <> 'O'

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMax_Edit
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMin_Edit
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcegrid2_SITE
Variable.Value: object.ue_Kit( CA(RV) FILTERPERM(Item like 'KIT%' AND (DerCustNum = V(HIL_FilterCustomer) OR DerCustNum = '' )) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: ue_HIL_MachineSearch( OBJNAME(items) FILTERPERM(itmUf_HIL_ItemDimentionsMixMatch = FV(ItemDimentionsMixMatch) AND ProductCode LIKE 'FG-%' AND ShowInDropDownList = 1 AND Stat <> 'O') LOCKMODE(Row) )
